name_cn:
Celine New Moon Bag • Black
Made of top-grain calfskin with a matte suede interior
Durable and soft, maintaining its shape 👜
Classic silhouette accented with the Arc de Triomphe gold buckle
Elevates your aura instantly
Dimensions: 22×7.5×17cm
